title: Invoica × PayAI Integration — Arb Bot Repurposing

human_gate.action: PRE Sprint — PayAI Service Registration. Tarek must register 3 services at payai.network using investor relationship. Returns 3 ServiceIDs. See docs/plans/payai-integration-roadmap.md#pre-sprint for exact steps.

context_note: Arb bot repo not yet located locally. Check github.com/skingem1/ for Solana/Meteora repos before queuing Sprint 050. agent-reputation-dashboard repo exists at github.com/skingem1/agent-reputation-dashboard (foundation for Sprint 053).

tasks.title: PayAI Service Registration — Human Action
tasks.description: Register 3 Invoica services on PayAI partner portal. Use investor relationship for direct access. Get PAYAI_SERVICE_ID_ROUTER, PAYAI_SERVICE_ID_TREASURY, PAYAI_SERVICE_ID_ORACLE. Add to .env.example. Negotiate 50% fee reduction for first 3 months.

tasks.title: Arb Bot — Fix F-01: Rotate exposed private key + gitignore
tasks.description: wallet/keypair.json contains a private key committed to the arb bot repo. Add wallet/keypair.json to .gitignore immediately. Document key rotation procedure in README. ROTATE THE KEY before any further commits.

tasks.title: Arb Bot — Fix F-02: Replace CPMM math with DLMM swapQuote()
tasks.description: CPMM x*y=k pricing model used for DLMM pools — categorically wrong. Replace all getAmountOut() calls with dlmm.swapQuote() across quotes.ts, cpmm.ts, and all pool adapters.

tasks.title: Arb Bot — Fix F-03: MeteoraPoolManager mint placeholder
tasks.description: meteoraSDK.ts:35 — MeteoraPoolManager passes WSOL as both mints A and B. Pass TOKEN_A_MINT and TOKEN_B_MINT from config. Root cause of all quote failures. Two-line fix.

tasks.title: Arb Bot — Fix F-05: BigInt() crash on base58 reserve fields
tasks.description: bsol.ts:170 — REST API returns base58 strings in reserve fields. BigInt() conversion crashes. Add type guard before every BigInt() conversion. Validate numeric string first. Log and skip if base58 is returned.

tasks.title: Arb Bot — Validation: 50 clean devnet cycles
tasks.description: Run 50 simulated cycles on devnet. Confirm quotes non-zero and directionally sane. Confirm circuit breaker triggers after 3 consecutive simulated losses. DO NOT proceed to Sprint 051 until this gate passes.

tasks.title: Payment Router — payai-gate.ts middleware
tasks.description: Create middleware/payai-gate.ts. Uses @payai/x402-sdk verifyPayAI(). Applied to /payai/router/*, /payai/treasury/*, /payai/oracle/*. Returns HTTP 402 without valid PayAI x402 header.

tasks.title: Payment Router — payment-router.ts service
tasks.description: Create backend/src/services/payment-router.ts. Wraps arb bot executeSwap() into route(invoiceId, tokenIn, amountIn) returning USDC settled. simulate:true flag by default.

tasks.title: Payment Router — wire into settlement route
tasks.description: Update settlement route in backend/src/routes/ — call payment-router.ts before booking. If tokenIn is the settlement token, passthrough. Otherwise route via arb bot.

tasks.title: Treasury Manager — treasury-yield.ts OpenClaw skill
tasks.description: CONDITIONAL: CEO Solana sprint must land first. Register invoica-treasury-yield skill via ClawRouter. Trigger: agent wallet above floor AND idle >10min. Calls arb bot fast-loop on Meteora BTC/SOL pool. Deposits yield to agent wallet. Safety rails hardcoded: max 2% drawdown/cycle, circuit breaker after 3 losses.

tasks.title: Treasury Manager — treasury-attribution.ts
tasks.description: Create backend/src/services/treasury-attribution.ts. Maps yield earned to agent identity. Primary data source for Reputation Oracle in Sprint 053.

tasks.title: Reputation Oracle — acp-scorer.ts + oracle route
tasks.description: Extend agent-reputation-dashboard (github.com/skingem1/agent-reputation-dashboard) to ingest treasury-attribution.ts output. Build acp-scorer.ts: weighted composite score (40% yield, 30% routing success, 20% settlement time, 10% task completion). Score 0-1000. Build oracle.ts route: GET /payai/oracle/score/:agentId, GET /payai/oracle/leaderboard, POST /payai/oracle/record.

tasks.title: Marketplace — public treasury endpoint + frontend tab
tasks.description: Create backend/src/routes/treasury-public.ts (no auth). Add /treasury dashboard tab to Next.js frontend. Emergency pause button kills yield engine only. Submit all 3 services to PayAI marketplace with cross-branding.

sprint_sequence: PRE-001 (human, 2 days) → parallel with Gas Backstop
SPRINT050-001 through SPRINT050-GATE → arb bot stabilisation (separate repo)
SPRINT051 → Payment Router (Invoica repo, needs PRE + Sprint050)
CEO Solana Sprint → already planned, now has urgency as gate for Sprint 052
SPRINT052 → Treasury Manager (conditional, needs Solana + Sprint051)
ceo_notes: PayAI integration does NOT displace Gas Backstop (Priority 1). Both tracks run in parallel — Gas Backstop in the Invoica repo, Arb Bot Stabilisation in the separate arb bot repo. PRE sprint is human-only and should start immediately. Flag CTO when CEO Solana sprint ships to confirm wallet interface before Sprint 052.
